creator: paaguti@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 189212
Shar with the port files

mg3a is a fork from mg2a. Developed by Bengt Larsson with minor contributions by myself. I have created a fork in github to preserve the code because since the last release in April 2017 I have not been able to contact the author and during December 2017, the original code repository under www.bengtl.net/files/mg3a was taken down.

The category for this port would be editors.
